title: Existence of Positive Solutions for Non Local p-Laplacian Thermistor   Problems on Time Scales
comment:
Accepted 04/September/2007, Journal of Inequalities in Pure and
  Applied Mathematics (JIPAM http://jipam.vu.edu.au)
summary:
We make use of the Guo-Krasnoselskii fixed point theorem on cones to prove
existence of positive solutions to a non local p-Laplacian boundary value
problem on time scales arising in many applications.

title: Necessary Optimality Conditions for a Dead Oil Isotherm Optimal Control   Problem
summary:
We study a system of nonlinear partial differential equations resulting from
the traditional modelling of oil engineering within the framework of the
mechanics of a continuous medium. Recent results on the problem provide
existence, uniqueness and regularity of the optimal solution. Here we obtain
the first necessary optimality conditions.
